nasb.text: Your shepherds are sleeping, O king of Assyria; Your nobles are lying down. Your people are scattered on the mountains And there is no one to regather them.

esv.text: Your shepherds are asleep, O king of Assyria; your nobles slumber. Your people are scattered on the mountains with none to gather them.

cnv.text: 亞述王啊！你的牧人睡覺， 你的貴族安歇， 你的子民分散在各山上， 沒有人招聚他們。

ccb.text: 亚述王啊！ 你的牧人沉睡，贵族酣眠， 你的百姓分散在群山上， 无人招聚他们。
